headline: Is Trending Stock Chipotle Mexican Grill, Inc. (CMG) a Buy Now?
summary: Chipotle (CMG) has been one of the stocks most watched by Zacks.com users lately. So, it is worth exploring what lies ahead for the stock.

headline: Chipotle plots further UK expansion as new London venue set to open
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill’s international boss Anat Davidzon said it has been ‘impressed’ by its momentum in the UK over the past year.
